testcase.name: test_custom_request_creates_doc_and_returns_fast
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase8.py:41: in test_custom_request_creates_doc_and_returns_fast assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","product_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"customer_name":"TEST_Phase8 Customer","email":"test_phase8@example.com","phone":"+371 20000000","garment_type":"hoodie","size_estimate":"M","fabric_preference":"organic cotton","color_palette":"ivory + charcoal","design_notes":"minimal logo, hand-pressed","quantity":1,"budget_range":"100-200","contact_preference":"email"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","idea_description"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"customer_name":"TEST_Phase8 Customer","email":"test_phase8@example.com","phone":"+371 20000000","garment_type":"hoodie","size_estimate":"M","fabric_preference":"organic cotton","color_palette":"ivory + charcoal","design_notes":"minimal logo, hand-pressed","quantity":1,"budget_range":"100-200","contact_preference":"email"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_mark_paid_first_call_sets_invoice_sent
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_phase8.py:75: in iban_order assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","shipping_address"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":{"line1":"Riga 1","city":"Riga","country":"LV","postal_code":"LV-1000"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_mark_paid_second_call_is_idempotent
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_phase8.py:75: in iban_order assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","shipping_address"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":{"line1":"Riga 1","city":"Riga","country":"LV","postal_code":"LV-1000"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
